cards.front: What is the main function of a Name Service?
cards.back: To translate human-readable domain names into IP addresses

cards.front: What is the Domain Name System (DNS)?
cards.back: A system that translates domain names into IP addresses and vice versa
A computer that stores and provides access to domain name information

cards.front: What is the purpose of a Root Zone?
cards.back: To provide the topmost level of domain name hierarchy and connectivity
The highest level of domain name hierarchy, such as .com, .org, or .net
